mapper.insert: insert into short_link_db.approval_record (id, campaign_id, workflow_instance_id, task_id, task_name, approver_id, approver_name, action, comment, approve_time, create_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{campaignId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workflowInstanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{approverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update short_link_db.approval_record set campaign_id = #{campaignId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, workflow_instance_id = #{workflowInstanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_name = #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approver_id = #{approverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, approver_name = #{approverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, action = #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approve_time = #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, campaign_id, workflow_instance_id, task_id, task_name, approver_id, approver_name, action, comment, approve_time, create_time from short_link_db.approval_record where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id, campaign_id, workflow_instance_id, task_id, task_name, approver_id, approver_name, action, comment, approve_time, create_time from short_link_db.approval_record
